column50:
Most of the people were affected by the excessive usage of electronic gadgets during COVID-19. We need to control and monitor the amount of time we spend on these gadgets. 

Parents should come up with some strategies to reduce the screen time of their children. Most of the kids are addicted to gadgets, which is a big obstacle in their creative development. 

Moreover, parents and adults should be careful while using their gadgets in front of the kids because kids love to imitate the grown ups.
